ICandidateConfigServiceGetParameterDataSourceConfiguration Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns the configured configuration for the specified parameter, or null if it has not been declared.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513

Copy

	string parameterName
